parsed_output.justification: James claims to be the Seer (having looked at the center cards), and Justin claims to be the Troublemaker who swapped James and Paul. Mitchell strongly supports James's claims. Since Paul has not made a role claim and is the target of the other three players, he is the most likely candidate for the Werewolf.
